ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "tweet_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment classification of the tweet (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtags associated with the tweet */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language in which the tweet was written */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet was favorited */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* User's Twitter handle or username */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "account_creation" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location specified in the user's Twitter profile */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (verified or not) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment type */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the sentiment label represents */,
  "sentiment_threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for determining sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag used in tweets */,
  "hashtag_category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Analyst's role in the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the platform was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet analyzed */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment determined from the analysis */,
  "analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score calculated during analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_results_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_results_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "urgency_level" TEXT /* Level of urgency (low, medium, high) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (threshold-based, anomaly-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Detailed data included in the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)
